_comment: M3 Max canonical benchmark matrix. Uses local_server provider (llama-server with Metal GPU acceleration). Start server: llama-server -m models/qwen3.5-0.8b-q8_0.gguf --port 8000 --ctx-size 4096 --n-predict 512 --gpu-layers -1 --reasoning-budget 0. Run: uv run python scripts/benchmark_conversations.py --matrix benchmarks/model_matrix.m3max.json --scenarios tests/conversations --local-server-url http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1 --name m3max-$(date +%Y%m%d). Expected: >=90% success, 100% recovery, ~1.3s avg latency, ~107 gen tok/s, ~774 MB.

profiles._comment: Canonical default — highest accuracy + lowest memory on M3 Max. Benchmark target: >=90% success, 100% recovery, ~774 MB, ~107 gen/s. Must run with llama-server started using --gpu-layers -1.
profiles.name: qwen3.5-0.8b-q8-llm

profiles._comment: Q4_K_M speed/memory variant — ~508 MB, ~130 gen/s on M3 Max. Trades ~10pp accuracy for 1.5x lower memory.

profiles._comment: Size scaling reference — 2b Q4_K_M. Ties 0.8b Q8_0 at 90% success on Intel but is 2x slower. On M3 Max still expected to be slower (more weight to move through bandwidth). Run once to confirm M3 Max scaling.
